# Task: Implement Event Emitter

## Objective

Implement a typed event emitter / pub-sub system according to the specification
in `spec.md`.

## Files

- `spec.md` — detailed specification for the event emitter
- `test_event_emitter.py` — test suite that your implementation must pass
- `event_emitter.py` — create this file with your implementation

## Requirements

- Read `spec.md` carefully and implement exactly what it describes
- All tests in `test_event_emitter.py` must pass
- The implementation must be in `event_emitter.py`
